zh.Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓
zh.lifeSummary: Hannah Lambe於1622年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德。她於大約1637年與Edmund Haynes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hannah Lambe于1622年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德。她于大约1637年与Edmund Haynes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Lambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Ethna.

variants.name: Lamb
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Lamb, a pet form of Lambert .
English: nickname for a meek and inoffensive person, from Middle English lamb, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper of lambs. See also Lamm .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luain ‘descendant of the warrior’, formerly Anglicized as O'Loan (see Lane 3). MacLysaght comments: "The form Lamb(e), which results from a more than usually absurd pseudo-translation (uan ‘lamb’), is now much more numerous than O'Loan itself.".

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Hannah Lambe was born in 1622, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. She married Edmund Haynes about 1637, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters.

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Lambe(은)는 1622년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1637년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 Edmund Haynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hannah Lambe родилась в 1622 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Haynes около 1637 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.
